description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the varikin/golang-glide-alpine Docker image. Define two stages: test and package. In the test stage add a test job that runs the global before_script (ln -s /builds /go/src/gitlab.com, cd /go/src/gitlab.com/varikin/romen, glide install) then executes make check. In the package stage add a package job that also runs the before_script, then runs go get github.com/GeertJohan/go.rice/rice and make VERSION=$CI_COMMIT_TAG bundle package, publishes the bin/ directory as an artifact, and only runs for tag pipelines.
